full_text:
Cao Rui 曹蕤
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Rui (曹蕤). Enfeoffed, and died without any achievements. Cao Rui was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cao Rui lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
